name: Manage Timeline (Create Tick)
description: Demonstrates the sequence of functions to create a new Tick in a campaign timeline.

sequence.action: GM clicks 'New Tick' and submits a narrative.
Calculates state to cascade from the previous tick.
Persists the new tick with cascaded state.
Refreshes timeline view to display the new tick.

sequence_diagram_mermaid:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor GM
    participant Browser as PCOMP-001 (Boundary)
    participant AppServer as PCOMP-002 (Controller)
    participant Database as PCOMP-003 (Entity)

    GM->>+Browser: Clicks 'New Tick' and enters narrative
    Browser->>+AppServer: POST /ticks (invokes LI-010)
    AppServer->>+AppServer: LF-012: Cascade Tick State
    AppServer->>+Database: INSERT INTO ticks...
    Database-->>-AppServer: returns new_tick_id
    AppServer-->>-Browser: returns {new_tick_id: ...}
    Browser->>-GM: Refreshes UI with new Tick
```
